SONGSUGAR Palette Options

4 Complete Themes: Wordmark + Tiles + Messages (Retro Stack) + UI

Special Tiles

Game effect tiles (white outline) and rare special tiles (gold outline + glow)

Game Effect Tiles — White/Off-white Outline

★

WILD

Matches any color
💣

BOMB

Clears area
❄️

FREEZE

Slows drop
🔀

SHUFFLE

Rearranges board
2×

2× SCORE

Double points

Warm Palette Variant (Analogue/Sunrise)

★

WILD

💣

BOMB

❄️

FREEZE

Rare Special Tiles — Gold Outline + Glow

✦

STAR

Super rare bonus
👑

CROWN

King combo
💎

DIAMOND

Precious drop
⚡

LIGHTNING

Chain reaction

Game effect tiles use outline only (no fill). Rare tiles add outer glow to stand out.

Drop-Shadow 3D Approach

Using CSS filter: drop-shadow() for 3D extrusion - works on any shape

BEAT

Individual

Merged Cluster

MELODY

Individual

Merged Cluster

VIBE

Individual

Merged Cluster

Larger Cluster Shapes

L-Shape (4 tiles)

T-Shape (5 tiles)

Plus (5 tiles)

Big Blob (6 tiles)

drop-shadow follows the shape perfectly - no sharp internal corner artifacts!

Three Approaches - Side by Side

Comparing how individual tiles vs clustered tiles look in each approach

A. No Visual Merge

Individual

Clustered

Individual tiles stay 3D extended. When clustered, they keep separate shapes but share a unified glow. Tiles don't fuse.

B. Two Visual Modes

Individual (3D)

Clustered (Soft)

Individual tiles are 3D extended. When clustered, they merge into one shape with soft shadow (no hard 3D).

C. Consistent Soft

Individual

Clustered

Both individual and merged use same soft shadow style. No hard 3D anywhere. Simpler, consistent.

Cluster Effect Options

When 3+ tiles connect, they form a cluster. Choose the visual effect style.

1. Outer Glow

Individual tiles with shared glow effect. Clean, modern look.

2. 3D Extruded

Deep 3D shadow layers. Bold, tactile feel.

3. Inner Bevel

Soft bevel with inner shadows. Subtle depth.

4. Neon Outline

Glowing neon border. Cyberpunk aesthetic.

5. Gradient Mesh

Multi-color gradient blend. Vaporwave vibes.

6. Pulse Animation

Breathing glow animation. Draws attention.

7. Merged + Glow

Single merged shape with glow. Blob-like.

8. Merged + 3D

Merged shape with 3D extrusion. Chunky.

9. Merged + Neon

Merged wireframe with glow. Tron-like.

10. Merged + Soft Shadow

Soft blurred shadow instead of hard 3D layers. Works with merged shapes.

11. Merged + Gradient Glow

Rich gradient with glowing shadow. Soft depth, no hard edges.

12. Merged + Border Depth

Border on bottom/right creates depth. Gradient adds dimension.

13. Merged + Pulse Glow

Soft shadow with pulsing glow animation. Draws attention.

14. WILD Tile (Neon 3D)

WILD/special tiles only. Neon wireframe + 3D depth.

15. Individual Tiles - 3D Extended

BEAT

MELODY

VIBE

WILD

Individual tiles with 3D extrusion. When clustered, could use styles 10-13 above.
